summary: Monte Carlo Real Calculations & Compliance Modal Fix Testing Complete - All features working correctly. Dashboard shows real Monte Carlo simulation data with varying probabilities (~49-50%), compliance modal only appears on first visit and persists correctly via localStorage, What-If scenario builder triggers new calculations, all dashboard tabs functional.
passed_tests: Monte Carlo API returns 200 status
Monte Carlo API returns all required fields (success_probability, median_outcome, best_case, worst_case, shortfall_risk, simulations_run)
Monte Carlo probability in valid range (0-100%)
Monte Carlo runs 10,000 simulations
Monte Carlo produces varying results (not static mock data)
Monte Carlo best_case > worst_case
Monte Carlo median between best and worst case
Health Score API returns score and grade
Recommendations API returns recommendations list
Net Worth Projection API returns projection data
API health check returns 200
Dashboard loads with real Monte Carlo data (~49% probability)
Dashboard shows 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations text
Dashboard shows Best Case ($12.8M), Median ($5.4M), Worst Case ($2.2M), Shortfall Risk (3.3%)
Compliance modal appears on first visit (localStorage cleared)
Compliance modal checkbox and 'I Understand & Accept' button work
Compliance modal sets localStorage (wheeler_compliance_acknowledged, halcyon_compliance_v2)
Compliance modal does NOT reappear after localStorage is set
Compliance modal does NOT reappear after navigation to other pages
Compliance modal does NOT reappear when returning to dashboard
What-If button opens scenario builder panel
What-If panel has 4 sliders (Savings Rate, Market Return, Retirement Age, Inflation)
What-If slider changes trigger Monte Carlo recalculation
What-If shows 'New Retirement Balance' and 'New Success Probability' when modified
What-If Reset button resets sliders to default values
Dashboard tab 'Wealth Insights' works
Dashboard tab 'Top Actions' works
Dashboard tab 'Projections' works
Dashboard tab 'Connected Accounts' works
Quick Scenario Comparison cards visible (Retire at 60, Retire at 65, Market Crash)
api_tests_passed: POST /api/decision-engine/monte-carlo-advanced - Returns real calculated data with 10,000 simulations
seed_data_creation: None - using existing Wheeler family demo data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Monte Carlo simulation now uses REAL calculations with 10,000 iterations via numpy. Compliance modal fixed to only show on first visit using localStorage keys: wheeler_compliance_acknowledged and halcyon_compliance_v2. What-If scenario builder triggers real Monte Carlo recalculations when sliders change. Connected Accounts data is still MOCKED.

mocked_apis_list: Connected Accounts data (Commonwealth Bank, Vanguard Super, CommSec)
Some recommendation fallback data when API fails

monte_carlo_real_calculations.returns: success_probability, median_outcome, best_case, worst_case, shortfall_risk, percentile_projections

compliance_modal_fix.behavior: Only shows on first visit, persists across navigation
compliance_modal_fix.fix_method: useEffect with localStorage check instead of module-level variable

dashboard_tabs.wealth_insights: Working - shows recommendations and stress tests
dashboard_tabs.top_actions: Working - shows ranked actions with $ impact
dashboard_tabs.projections: Working - shows net worth projection chart and goal progress
